title: CoinNugget
description: This resource pack changes the gold and iron nugget texture to gold and iron coins.
body:
**This resource pack changes the gold and iron nugget texture to gold and iron coins.**

This package was originally created by DoomedArtemis (https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nuggets-to-coins), but was discontinued. This package contains exactly the same textures, but has also been retranslated into German.

This project will be also available for 1.20.x in the future.
